raw_consumer_statement:
Complaint against : Citibank N.A. 
Date : XX/XX/year> Complainant : XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX, NY XXXX Account : XXXX XXXX XXXX by XXXX ending XXXX ( old )/ XXXX ( new ). 

I am filing this complaint against Citibank for wrongfully closing a fraud dispute and ruling it " Customer Responsible '' despite documented evidence proving physical impossibility. 
The disputed charge : {$1700.00} at XXXX XXXX XXXX NY, XX/XX/year> at XXXX XXXX ET an in-store, card-present transaction. 
Why the finding is impossible : My physical card was in XXXX, XXXX on XX/XX/year>. I had used it in person at XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/year> to pick up a rental vehicle a transaction requiring physical card presence, confirmed on my statement as " XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX {$670.00}. '' On XX/XX/year>, I returned the rental car at XXXX XXXX at XXXX XXXX local time and boarded XXXX flight XXXX, departing XXXX XXXX at XXXX XXXX local time ( XXXX XXXX XXXX ), arriving XXXX XXXX at XXXX XXXX  ET. At XXXX XXXX  ET the exact time of the XXXX XXXX charge I was physically mid-flight over the XXXX XXXX. The card was on the plane with me. It was not in XXXX. It could not have been in XXXX. 
How the fraud was discovered : On XX/XX/year>, while mid-flight from XXXX to New York, I received a fraud notification on my card. Immediately upon landing at XXXX, I called Citibank and confirmed that I had not made the {$1700.00} purchase at XXXX XXXX in XXXX as I had been in the air over the XXXX at the time of the charge. The Citi representative assured me the matter would be taken care of. 
Citi 's investigative failures : All evidence above was communicated to Citi representatives on multiple occasions. Not a single representative asked for additional documentation throughout the investigation. 
Only on the final call on XX/XX/year> after the investigation was effectively concluded did a representative ask whether I had filed a police report for a stolen card. The card was never stolen or lost. It was physically in my possession throughout. A Citi representative had canceled the card during the phone call. No representative ever suggested filing a police report until the investigation was already over. 
Despite all of this, Citi closed the dispute as " XXXX XXXX. '' Prior actions taken : Fraud reported to Citi : XX/XX/year> Dispute filed : XX/XX/year> Formal appeal submitted to XXXX : XX/XX/year> XXXX XXXX notified of potential card compromise : Case # XXXX XXXX complaint against XXXX : Complaint # XXXX Desired resolution : Immediate reversal of the " Customer Responsible '' finding and full credit of {$1700.00} to my account.
